title: Hiring Production Engineer at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Charak Pharma South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Charak Pharma South Asia Partners:
Charak Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma South Asia Partners!
